summary: Phase 0+1 backend regression: 26/26 pytest cases pass against the public preview URL. Health/root banner, auth contract (401 vs 403 semantics), domain enforcement code path, seeded admin, today's 3 slots, MongoDB indexes (users.email unique, user_sessions TTL, bookings partial-unique on user+date and date+slot_key, bookings TTL), and authenticated profile-update flow (regex validation + persistence) all verified.

minor.issue: Unused `authorization: str | None = None` query-style param on the logout signature (routes/auth.py:122). Harmless but misleading — deletion is by user_id, not by token. Cosmetic only.

action_items: Optional cleanup: remove the unused `authorization` parameter from `logout` in /app/backend/routes/auth.py to avoid future confusion; deletion is already keyed on user_id from the dependency.
critical_code_review_comments: get_current_user correctly uses Header(default=None) and returns 401 (not 403) on missing/invalid bearer — matches integration playbook.

Domain enforcement: services/domain.is_diu_email + routes/auth.py raises 403 with ALLOWED_DOMAIN message for non-@diu.edu.bd emails. Branch verified by source inspection (cannot drive real Google OAuth end-to-end).
All Mongo reads project {_id: 0}; ObjectId never leaks into responses.
Indexes (users.email unique, user_sessions.expires_at TTL=0, bookings partial-unique on user_id+date and date+slot_key with status=active, bookings.expires_at TTL=0) all created and asserted.
Seed is idempotent (admin upsert preserves role; slots use $setOnInsert keyed on date+slot_key).
Profile update enforces STUDENT_ID_RE ^[A-Za-z0-9-]{3,32}$ at the route layer in addition to Pydantic length checks; invalid chars → 400, too-short → 422 (Pydantic).
POST /api/auth/session correctly maps Emergent non-200 to 401, missing email/token to 502, and non-DIU email to 403.
seed_data_creation: Tests insert a temporary user_sessions row with session_token='TEST_session_token_pytest' bound to the seeded admin user_id and tear it down via fixture. The admin's student_id is temporarily set to TEST-ADMIN-0001 in one persistence test and restored to ADMIN-0001 immediately after.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Phase 0+1 is solid. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_phase1.py as the regression suite for future phases. The admin_session/admin_headers fixtures in conftest.py give you a Bearer token bound to the seeded admin without going through Google OAuth — use them for any authenticated endpoint testing. Real Google OAuth cannot be automated; rely on these synthetic sessions plus code-path inspection. Run with: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://hostel-turf-base.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v
